themePanelThemeTooltip: Select the theme you want Steam to use (requires reload)
themePanelInjectJavascriptToolTip: Decide whether themes are allowed to insert JavaScript into Steam. Disabling JavaScript may break Steam interface as a byproduct (requires reload)
themePanelInjectCSSToolTip: Decide whether themes are allowed to insert stylesheets into Steam. (requires reload)
themePanelCustomAccentColorToolTip: Override your system accent color within Steam. This has no effect unless a theme is using your system accent color.
themePanelCustomColorNotUsed: Note: The active theme does NOT use this setting.
themePanelCustomColorUsed: Note: The active theme uses this setting!
updatePanelHasUpdatesSub: Millennium found the following updates for you!
updatePanelNoUpdatesFound: No updates available. Everything's up to date!
updatePanelUpdateChannelTooltip: Select which update channel you want to receive updates from.
updatePanelBetaWarning: Warning: Experimental builds may be unstable and contain bugs. Only use this channel if you understand the risks involved.
optionPluginNeedsReload: To enable or disable the selected plugins, a reload is required. Are you sure you want to continue?
updatePanelUpdateNotificationsTooltip: Get Millennium to give you a reminder when an item in your library has an update!
errorSubmitIssueNotValid: Your issue is not valid. Make sure your issue does not involve a plugin or theme, if it does, please contact the developer of the plugin or theme.
errorSubmitIssueNoDescription: Please provide a description of your issue (10 characters or more).
errorSubmitIssueNoSteps: Please provide an overview on how to reproduce your issue (10 characters or more).
errorSubmitIssueTooFrequent: Woah there! You're submitting issues too quickly. Please wait a bit before submitting another issue.
updateSuccessfulRestart: Successfully updated {0}! As you currently have it active, you will need to restart Steam for the changes to take effect.
updateFailed: Failed to update {0}! Check the logs for more information.
messageUpdateDisableClarification: Do you want to disable update checks entirely, or just disable the update these notifications? You can always change this in Millennium Settings later.
message1162025SecurityUpdate: We're deciding to update our security protocols to better benefit you, and the community as a whole. As of 3/27/2025, we've decided to implement measures to explicitly ask you if you want to receive updates from Millennium.
message1162025SecurityUpdateTooltip: This is solely Millennium updates, not theme and plugin updates, which are handled separately and were never automatic
toggleWantsMillenniumUpdates: Do you want Millennium to check for updates?
toggleWantsMillenniumUpdatesTooltip: If enabled, Millennium will automatically check for updates. Updates will NOT automatically be applied unless you've disabled notifications (the setting below). You will receive a popup box with the option to update or dismiss.
toggleWantsMillenniumUpdatesNotification: Do you want to be notified when updates are found? (similar to this popup)

If check for updates is on, an update is found, and this setting is on, you will receive a popup box with the option to update, or stay on the version you're already on. If check for updates is on, an update is found, and you do NOT have this setting enabled, you will not receive a popup box and the update will be applied automatically.
updateSecurityWarning: It's highly recommended to keep these settings enabled, as it ensures you're always up-to-date with the latest security fixes. Failure to keep Millennium updated may result in security vulnerabilities, broken features, or other issues.
settingsAreChangeableLater: You can change these settings later in Millennium Settings.
strAnUpdateIsAvailable: An update is available for Millennium! We're showing you this message because you've opted in to receive updates. If you no longer want to receive these messages, you can turn on automatic updates, or you can disable updates entirely from Millennium Settings.
updateFailedPluginRunning: Millennium can't update "{0}" while it's running, you'll need to disable it first.
updatePanelErrorHeader: An error occurred while checking for updates!
updatePanelErrorBody: Please check your internet connection and try again.
errorFailedConnectionBody: This issue isn't network related, you're most likely missing a file millennium needs, or are experiencing an unexpected bug.
strInvalidPluginBuildMessage: This plugin does not have a valid build for your OS.
strAlreadyInPluginLibrary: {0} is already in your plugin library!
errorFailedToStartThemeInstaller: Failed to start internal installer module...
warningThemeAlreadyInstalled: You already have this theme installed! Would you like to reinstall it? If you've added any custom files their data will be lost.
warnProceedInstallation: Are you sure you want to proceed with the installation?
optionWhenAnUpdateForMillenniumIsAvailab: When an update for Millennium is available
optionWhenAPluginOrThemeUpdateIsAvailabl: When a plugin or theme update is available
tooltipCheckForMillenniumUpdates: Checking for updates is disabled, this setting will not take effect.
strWelcomeModalDescription:
We're thrilled to welcome you to the community! Since this is your first time launching, it's the perfect moment to give you a quick introduction to a few key features.

If you're not familiar yet, most of Millennium's settings can be accessed from Steam → Millennium.

From there, you'll find directions on where to install themes/plugins, how to enable/disable certain features, and more. And remember, you can always [view our documentation](https://docs.steambrew.app) if you have any questions.
millenniumUpdateSuccessMessage: Successfully updated Millennium to {0}. Changes will take effect after a restart.
quickCssDescription: Quick CSS is way to make simple tweaks to the UI, without needing a full fledged theme. All changes are applied in real-time with the exception of any web views, those require a reload.
quickCssWatchFileDescription: Watch and automatically apply changes when QuickCSS is externally modified
quickAccessEmptyLibraryBody: Your library is empty, we've got nothing for you to manage.
themeConfigChangeReloadBody: Your theme settings have been updated. Would you like to reload the Steam UI to apply the changes?
logPanelNoLogsBody: Nothing to see here! Once you have some logs, they'll show up here.
crashModalDescPre: The {0} plugin stopped unexpectedly — this is almost certainly a bug in the plugin, not Steam or Millennium. If it keeps happening, find the plugin in the
crashModalDescPost: and report the issue directly to its own repository — not the database itself. Check existing issues first to avoid duplicates, and include the exit code and crash files from the dump below.
crashModalExitCodeDescription: The exit code reported by the process. Include this when reporting the bug.
crashModalCrashDumpDescription: The following folder contains crash dumps that may have been generated by the plugin. Include any relevant crash dumps when reporting the bug.
crashModalPluginLogsDescription: View the plugin's log output for additional context on what happened before the crash.

pluginUninstallFailed: Failed to uninstall {0}. Check the logs tab for more details.
pluginChromeExtension: This plugin is an external chrome extension
pluginEncounteredErrors: {0} encountered errors. Please check the logs tab for more details.
pluginIssuedWarnings: {0} issued warnings. Please check the logs tab for more details.

themePanelNoThemesBody: It appears you don't have any themes yet!

millenniumUpdateMacOS:
Automatic Millennium updates are not yet available on macOS.

Rebuild the current branch, reinstall it with `./scripts/install_macos.sh --repair`, then restart Steam to finish updating to {0}.
millenniumUpdateLinux:
To update Millennium to {0}, run the following command in your terminal:

`{1}`
legacyPluginModalBody: Heads up! The following plugins were built for an older version of Millennium and no longer work. Good news — an update might already be available!
legacyPluginDisabledTooltip: This plugin is outdated and no longer works — but an update is available. Install it to keep using the plugin.
supersededPluginModalBody: The following plugins were built on a legacy Millennium runtime, which has been removed. To continue using these plugins, install [Extendium](https://steambrew.app/plugin?id=788ed8554492) as a replacement. Refer to [Extendium's README](https://steambrew.app/plugin?id=788ed8554492) for usage instructions.
